prompt: Create a clean square anime-style profile icon portrait of a fashionable young man, cropped from upper chest to just above the hair, centered on a plain white background. He has tousled layered warm blond hair with dark ink outlines, swept volume at the crown, shaggy side pieces, and a slightly undercut look around the ears. The face is intentionally hidden by a large centered opaque square block in warm beige, covering the eyes, nose, mouth, and most of the cheeks, leaving only the hair, ears, neck, collarbones, and clothing visible. Show both ears with multiple gold piercings: small hoop and stud combinations, plus one dangling gold earring with a green diamond-shaped gem on the viewer’s right. The character wears a stylish open-collar black shirt with sharp folds and a black choker or thin necklace visible at the base of the neck. Use crisp manga line art, polished cel shading, soft skin shadows, high-resolution icon composition, minimal background, modern social avatar aesthetic, and no text.
